/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/color-picker_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/src/ColorSlot.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/src/ColorPicker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/src/PickerOverlay.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/src/WaylandPortalPicker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/color-picker.dir/src/ComparisonPanel.cpp.o" -o color-picker  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
